title: Queries where a "is null" clause is combined with two equals clauses fail to produce the expected result.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sys_c_has_a (owner_table VARCHAR(32672), owner_id BIGINT, relation_name VARCHAR(32672), property_table VARCHAR(32672), property_id BIGINT, property_class VARCHAR(32672));
CREATE TABLE FOO (a VARCHAR(8), b VARCHAR(8), c BIGINT);
INSERT INTO sys_c_has_a (owner_table, owner_id, relation_name, property_table, property_id, property_class) VALUES (NULL, 1, 'relation1', 'SIMPLE', 100, 'class1');
INSERT INTO FOO (a, b, c) VALUES ('val1', 'val2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM sys_c_has_a WHERE owner_table IS NULL AND property_table = 'SIMPLE' AND property_id = 100;
key_bug_features: is null combined with two equals clauses
